<!-- Do NOT paste real conversation data, secrets, or personal data. Redact paths/values. -->

**Tool name / vendor:**

**Operating system(s):** macOS / Windows / Linux

**Storage path(s)** (use `~`, `$ENV`, and globs; describe the *location*, not contents):

```
e.g. ~/Library/Application Support/ExampleTool/**/*.jsonl
```

**Category:** transcript / cache / embedding_index / config_with_secrets / log / attachment

**Format:** jsonl / sqlite / leveldb / plaintext / plist / json / binary / dir

**Why it matters (one sentence):**

**How did you confirm this?** (app version + date if you checked a real install → `verified`;
documented → `likely`; heard/reported → `unverified`)

**Anything else** (retention setting, guidance to reduce exposure):
